description:
## Goal

Author `config/model.toml` — runtime configuration for the LLM provider and the retrieval re-ranking weights.

## File Location

`config/model.toml`

## Required Sections

```toml
[model]
provider = "ollama"            # ollama | anthropic | openai
model_name = "qwen3:8b"
temperature = 0.3              # low temp for factual grounding
max_tokens = 2048

[retrieval]
top_k = 15                     # chunks injected into prompt
vector_weight = 0.5
graph_weight = 0.5
diversity_boost = 1.3          # multiplier for cross-tradition results
```

## Acceptance Criteria

- Loads cleanly via `tomli`
- Consumed by `guru/model.py` (provider selection) and `guru/retriever.py` (re-rank weights)
- Comments document each option's accepted values and rationale
